full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Naming the baseline and explaining improvements from Latent Structural SVM
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What baseline does the paper compare against in Section 5.3? Name it explicitly (Ranking SVM or standard Structural SVM without latent variables) and explain improvements.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Clarified baseline name and Table 3 reference.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked Section 5.3 and Table 3 in the paper.

top_5_prompts.prompt: What baseline does the paper compare against in the ranking experiment (Section 5.3)?
Name the baseline: Ranking SVM or standard Structural SVM without latent variables?
How does the Latent Structural SVM improve over the baseline for Precision@k?
What is the limitation of the baseline (no latent variable)?
Where in the paper (e.g. Table 3) are baseline vs Latent SVM results reported?

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Part B.
